title: EconomyQuest
description: Dynamic hourly shops, rewarding quests, and secure ATM transfers. A simple way to build an active server economy
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ad15d1eedb9355d9b3154a0e41828afbe67264e.png)

![Setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/701d60df00d2a57e01cc4aea193b9f7936202a7a_0.webp)

Getting started is simple. Follow these 3 steps:

1. **Spawn Shop NPC**: Stand where you want the shop and type:
   `/money shop spawn`

2. **Spawn Quest NPC**: Stand where you want daily quests and type:
   `/money quest spawn`

3. **Setup ATMs**: Look at any Chest and type:
   `/money atm place`

Players are ready to go with a starting balance of **$1,000**.

![WAYSTOEARN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9452285fc3a2b6442793a6652ed08e069ef419c1_0.webp)

### 1. Mob Hunting
Earn money instantly by defeating hostile mobs:
*   **Zombie / Skeleton:** $25
*   **Creeper:** $35
*   **Enderman:** $60
*   **Blaze:** $70
*   **Wither Skeleton:** $80
*   **Wither Boss:** $5,000
*   **Ender Dragon:** $10,000

### 2. Daily Quests
Complete 3 new quests every day for massive rewards!
*   **Types:** Kill Mobs, Mine Ores, Catch Fish, Harvest Crops, and more.
*   **Rewards:** Earn between **$1,000 - $3,500** per quest!
*   **Bonus:** Quests reset automatically every 3 hours.

### 3. Selling Items
Sell your gathered resources at the Shop!
*   Sell **any item** in the game.
*   Ores and valuables sell for higher prices.
*   Dynamic pricing ensures a balanced economy.

![Player Commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebc05df8453dd8adb68e27f7828a502228a40987.png)

*   `/money` - View your balance (sleek single-line display)
*   `/money <player>` - Check someone else's balance
*   `/money top` - View the richest 10 players
*   `/money shop` - Open the shop menu directly
*   `/money quest` - View and accept daily quests
*   `/money about` - Plugin and version information

---

![Admin Commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a06f8ce7c87eea32fa428787619bfbb483e6a67a.png)

*   **Money Control:**
  
    *   `/money give <player> <amount>` - Add money to a player
    *   `/money set <player> <amount>` - Set a player's balance
    *   `/money take <player> <amount>` - Remove money from a player
    *   `/money reset <player>` - Reset balance to $1,000
  
*   **NPC & ATM Management:**
  
    *   `/money shop spawn` - Spawn Shop NPC
    *   `/money shop remove` - Remove aimed Shop NPC
    *   `/money quest spawn` - Spawn Quest NPC
    *   `/money quest remove` - Remove aimed Quest NPC
    *   `/money atm place` - Create ATM on aimed chest
    *   `/money atm remove` - Remove ATM from aimed chest
  
*   **Cleanup Commands:**
  
    *   `/money remove villager` - Remove the villager you are aiming at (Shop/Quest only)
    *   `/money remove villager all` - Remove all Shop + Quest villagers
    *   `/money remove holograms` - Remove ATM holograms
    *   `/money remove nearhologram [radius]` - Remove nearest ATM hologram
    *   `/money remove all` - Remove Shop + Quest villagers + ATM holograms
  
*   **System & Management:**
  
    *   `/money admin toggleshop` - Enable/Disable /money shop command
    *   `/money admin togglequest` - Enable/Disable /money quest command
    *   `/money admin resetshop` - Manually restock the shop
    *   `/money admin resetquests` - Manually reset all player quests
    *   `/money reload` - Reload all configurations

---

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fadd222939933d3e89c1486caaba839ae263cf54_0.webp)

*   **Smart Economy:** Real-time balance updates in your ActionBar.
*   **Dynamic Shop:** 70+ items that cycle every hour. Rare items appear with lower chances.
*   **Daily Quests:** 8 different quest types (Kill, Mine, Fish, etc.) with high-paying rewards.
*   **Sell System:** Players can sell any Minecraft item in existence using the sell menu.
*   **Secure ATMs:** A GUI-based money transfer system using physical chests as interaction points.
*   **Protection:** Built-in anti-exploit and inventory protection. Low performance impact.

---

## ATM & Transfers

No more complex commands to pay friends. Just:
1. Right-click an ATM chest.
2. Select a player from the GUI.
3. Choose the amount and confirm.
4. Transaction logged and money sent instantly.

---
